name: Theatres des Vampires
description: '''Theatres des Vampires''' is an Italian [[gothic metal]] band, mostly noted for the predominant theme of [[vampirism]] within their lyrics. The band's early material was credited as [[melodic black metal]] or [[symphonic black metal]], but the group completely abandoned all black metal influence by the mid-2000s. Theatres des Vampires have released eleven full-length albums.
